name: Iori Nagase
description: Iori is [Taichi's](https://anilist.co/character/40195/) classmate, a bright, friendly, popular girl. She's the president of the Cultural Research Club, but rather than lead everyone, she sets the mood and gets them excited. Occasionally she takes bold actions in front of others, be it due to carelessness or simple naivety. She is described as the most beautiful girl in her grade, and won the first year Miss Yamaboshi pageant.

name: Mika Egashira
description: Mitsumi's classmate who approached her after Mitsumi became friends with Sousuke. Mitsumi's pure nature inspired her to face her complexes. She develops a caring relationship with Mitsumi.

name: Minato Hinageshi
description: 21 years old. Firefighter. A trusted team member with a strong sense of righteousness. Physically dextrous and seemingly able to take on anything, but always put in extra effort. ~!He dies from saving someone in winter and appears to Hinako in water every time she sings their song.!~

Her actual "father" would be Timothy Wayneright, the man who commissioned her construction and father of the real Dorothy Wayneright. name: Luna
description: Part of the Guild Staff, she is the go-to woman for adventurers visiting the guild. Luna is a very kind, caring and cheerful young woman who has a rather ''Onee-chan'' (big sister) aura about her. She has common sense which is a rarity in the Fantasy World. Luna is also a calm person, taking everything in stride.

name: Niko Mikadono
description: Niko is the second eldest of the Mikadono Sisters. Despite her small stature of 150cm, Niko is a karate athlete who overwhelms her opponents with immense strength, winning numerous medals. She has exceptional physical abilities since childhood, dominating various martial arts competitions, and her robust and charismatic personality reflects her strict attitude towards herself and others. However, she also has a shy side and has a tendency to enjoy cute and bright things.

description: Shouma Toriashi is an old friend of Yoshino's and his adopted relative. Currently he's a university student. ~!He was abandoned by his biological father in middle school, and became an orphan. He was then adopted by Yoshino's grandfather Somei Renji.!~

description: __Height__: 173 cm (5' 8.5") Has been part of the photography club since his first year in high school. His hobby is taking pictures of his crush, Chan-Il.

name: Hee-Won Jung
description: Jung Heewon is a member of Kim Dokja's party. She was part of the marginalized group from Geumho station. She becomes one of the most vital party members, sometimes referred to as the "sword" of the group.

name: Hinata Tachibana
description: Hinata Tachibana is a beleaguered 32-year-old office worker, and he and his handsome best friend Tsukasa Jinguuji were summoned to another world by a naked goddess. However, because of the goddess's mischief, Tachibana was turned into a beautiful girl. To get his body back, he has to go on a journey with his best friend to defeat the demon king.

At the beginning of the story he helped Saya Takagi escape danger, though only did so by following her orders. His skills as a marksman have proven to be a valuable asset to keeping everyone alive. name: Layla Serizawa
description: Although her name is often transliterated as "Reira", her actual name is "Layla", after Eric Clapton's famous song of the same name. She is half-American, half-Japanese, and is the lead singer of Trapnest. She also penned some of their songs. Layla's friendship with her band comes all the way back to her elementary school days, starting with Takumi Ichinose. The two met when Layla and her mother moved to Japan. name: Nene Odagiri
description: Nene is one of the seven witches and Vice president of the Student Council. ~!Nene's abilities is captured. When she kisses, that person will fall in love with her and she can make them do whatever she wants. There is a limitation though, if the person she kissed is already under the effects of another witch's power then the Captured won't happen. Odagiri gained that power by the desire to become popular. !~

name: Rance
description: Rance is a Rank level 2 swordsman. A kichiku warrior by nature, he is motivated by sexual instincts instead of love or justice. He lives in the a small town named Ice, of the Free Cities, and is member of the local Keth Guild, taking on various odd jobs when money runs out. He has a slave named Sill Plain, and owns a humanoid artificial lifeform named Athena #2. His heroics have saved three out of the four major nations in the world from being conquered by Demons, as well as helping quite a numb

name: Ryuusuke Minami
description: A Japanese character with a long history in America, he speaks fluent English, and frequently uses both Japanese and English in his conversations. He lives alone in a shack by the fishing pond. His skills and taste in music inspire Koyuki to take up the guitar. The band's creator, Ryusuke is BECK's lead guitarist. A once-younger Ryusuke and Eddie Lee stole the Lucille from the trunk of Syke's vehicle.
